name: Diaochan

skills.name: Explosion of Fragrance
skills.description: Applies stacks to the opponent. At max stacks, inflicts AoE damage and slow while restoring Health.

skills.name: Returning Lotus
skills.description: Sends out a lotus in a direction that returns to her when it reaches its max distance, damaging enemies in its path.

skills.name: Petals in the Wind
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, during which she is untargetable. Launches orbs to attack nearby enemies, dealing damage and reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

skills.name: Flowery Potential
skills.description: Diaochan conjures up a magic circle around her, which lasts for a period oftime. While she is within the circle, the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 aresped up. The circle deals damage to enemies within it when it is generatedand when it expires.

tips: Diaochan (Mage): Tier A on international ranked — 48.22% WR.
Build core: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Insatiable Tome.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 48.22%, pick 0.84%, ban 0.1%, popularity tier A.
Counters Luna, Zhang Fei · Weak into Liang, Mulan.

faqs.question: Is Diaochan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Diaochan is Tier A Mage with 48.22% win rate, 0.84% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Diaochan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Insatiable Tome, Clandestine Cape, Breakthrough Robe, Boots of Resistance. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Diaochan?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Diaochan: Liang, Mulan. Diaochan is strong into Luna, Zhang Fei.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Luna, Zhang Fei. Countered by: Liang, Mulan.
